description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On Tuesday, April 28, we received a donation from Hanno Rotary Club to support environmental education for elementary and junior high school students.

We have been receiving donations with this same purpose since fiscal year 2022 (Reiwa 4). In fiscal years 2022 and 2024 (Reiwa 6), we used the funds to purchase environmental learning materials for Hanno municipal elementary schools. In fiscal years 2023 and 2025 (Reiwa 7), we did the same for Hanno municipal junior high schools.

We will use this latest donation effectively, in keeping with the donor's intentions.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202604/13514.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Hanno Rotary Club Donation Received
